property.description: IP fragmentation : A fragment with a size less than 9 bytes (allowed but could be an evasion).

beginning.property: <event value="COMPUTE" event_id="2" description="IP fragment with the same identification and an offset less than 9 bytes" boolean_expression="(ip.identification == ip.identification.1) and (ip.frag_offset > ip.frag_offset.1) and ((ip.frag_offset - ip.frag_offset.1) < 9)"/>
